creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

+++ head/www/mod_wsgi3/Makefile	Fri May 30 05:31:32 2014	(r355778)
@@ -1,10 +1,9 @@

-PORTVERSION=	3.4
-PORTREVISION=	1

-MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE

 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${APACHE_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	3
